title: LLMOps · Observability, tracing, and incident response
focus: Instrument prompts, retrieval, tools, model calls, costs, and user outcomes so failures are debuggable.

items.label: Sketch the trace schema: prompt, context, retrieved docs, tool calls, model, latency, cost
Define alerts for hallucination spikes, tool failures, latency, cost, and refusal drift
Write an incident playbook for bad generated advice or unsafe tool execution

interviewQuestions: What do you log for an LLM request, and what should you avoid logging?
How do you debug a sudden hallucination spike?
How would you run an incident review for an unsafe agent action?
